name: Human
description: No race bonus or weakness. Well rounded and adaptable.

name: Elf
description: Small, bright, quick. Afraid most of the time but surprisingly capable.

name: Troll
description: Big and strong, incredibly dumb. Might try to stab a dragon with a club.

name: Orc
description: Like trolls but stronger. Incredibly stupid, prefer forests and caves.

name: Gnome
description: High resistance to drugs. Quick, very wise, hang around mountain tops.

name: Dwarf
description: Stout, love ale, good fighters, respectable with magic.

name: Gnoll
description: Pretty weak, not bright, but extremely powerful poisons. Combat at distance.

name: Gargoyle
description: Only come out at night. Powerful, can fly, possess magical capabilities.

name: Hobbit
description: Small, brave, quick, intelligent. Out-smart enemies like Bilbo Baggins.

name: Mutant
description: Chaos theory in the flesh. Unpredictable hit/miss rates.
